title: Coordinate sender
description: Simple fabric mod that adds a feature to quickly paste your coordinates in chat alongside a customizable prompt
body:
A simple fabric mod that adds a feature to quickly paste your coordinates in chat alongside a customizable prompt

For any bugs, suggestions or problems, please dm @reyszn_ on discord

**IMPORTANT :** This mod has only been created for personal purposes, so don't expect immediate changes.

# FAQ

### Does this mod work with feather & lunar client?

Yes

### Can i make changes to this mod?

Yes, it's protected by an MIT license which allows modification

### Does this work for newer versions?

Yes, specifically for 1.21.1, 1.21 & 1.21.4
